Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Independents]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Independents are an alliance consisting of the Consultants, Alchemists, Greenwardens, and Luminians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Consultants are Independents who are against the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Independents publish news-sheets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Independents are a group that cannot successfully establish a new world order if they only serve the world up to the Elders.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Independents are the group characterized as being opposed to the Imperialists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Independents want to establish a new world order.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Independents are currently weakened and quiet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Independents have accepted Calder's proposal for peace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Independents agreed to a meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Independents escaped using an escape plan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Guild is on the side of the Independents in the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Independents must be put an end to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Independents are ignoring Calder's messages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Independents were the ones who struck first in the Witness account.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Independents want Bliss out of the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Independents were coming.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Gardeners are mentioned in relation to the Independents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Independents may have taken the Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Independents are prying the Emperor's armor off Calder.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Independents have taken over and fortified a hotel on the outskirts of the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Independents are a group involved in the current scenario.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Independents include alchemists and Greenwardens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Independents are a faction involved in peace meetings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Hand-selected Independents are waiting among the crowd below.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Captured Independents were released from the Imperial Palace dungeons days ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The Consultant Guild gathered strength to oppose the Independents.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
